1991July 15, 1991

🇯🇵 Sapporo, Japan

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Sapporo, Japan, July 1991

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-1991-07-sapporo-japan

22 Resolutions

100Plenary
Thank Japan member body and NICOGRAPH for meeting hospitality
SC 4 wishes to thank the Japan member body and NICOGRAPH for their hospitality and for the quality of their meeting arrangements during the SC 4 session in Sapporo.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
99Plenary
Establish four-month review period for first Committee Drafts of STEP Parts
It is SC 4 policy that the review period for first Committee Drafts of STEP Parts should be not less than four months.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
98Plenary
Establish Editing Committee for ISO 10303 and appoint chairman
SC 4 directs its Secretariat to establish an Editing Committee for ISO 10303 in accordance with the ISO Directives. In addition to assistance in the preparation of texts, consistent between themsel...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
97Plenary
Request P-members to assess national requirements for ISO 10303
SC 4 asks all P Members to assess their national requirements for future editions of ISO 10303. An initial list is requested by 1 Oct 91 to be sent to SPAG.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
96Plenary
Encourage liaison with bodies developing STEP application protocols
SC 4 encourages and welcomes liaison with any external body which meets the ISO criteria and is developing STEP application protocols.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
95Plenary
Establish liaison with ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 21/WG 3 and appoint representative
SC 4 moves to accept the offer of a liaison with ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 21/WG 3 and appoints Mr Augusto Nieva (Italy) to serve in this role.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
94Plenary
Appoint Mr. Jerry Weiss as chairman of PMAG
SC 4 appoints Mr. Jerry Weiss as chairman of the Project Management Advisory Group.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
93Plenary
Appoint Mr. Jean-Pierre Letouzey as chairman of SPAG
SC 4 appoints Mr. Jean-Pierre Letouzey as chairman of the Strategic Planning Advisory Group.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
92Plenary
Send proposed SPAG strategic policy statement for mail ballot
SC 4 sends out for mail ballot the proposed strategic policy statement developed by the SPAG in document ISO/TC 184/SC 4/SPAG N27.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
91Plenary
Request SPAG to select or create an enterprise taxonomy
SC 4 asks that the SPAG review existing materials with the intent to select or create an enterprise taxonomy. The deliverable from this task would provide an approach for SC 4 to use, as a tool, to...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
90Plenary
Assign additional responsibilities to the Strategic Planning Advisory Group
The Strategic Planning Advisory Group is given the additional responsibility for: * Reviewing any new work item proposal to be presented to SC 4. * Examining how each new work item proposal will fi...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
89Plenary
Modify terms of reference for the Strategic Planning Advisory Group
SC 4 modifies the terms of reference for the SPAG (SC 4 resolution 48) as follows: replace: "acting as a liaison with relevant bodies" with: "acting as a strategic liaison with the relevant bodies ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
87Plenary
Establish JWG 9 with IEC/TC 3 for electrical and electronic applications
SC 4 welcomes the proposal from IEC/TC 3 to work jointly on the topic of electrical and electronic product data standards and establishes a joint working group (JWG 9) with the following title and ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
86Plenary
Assign three projects to the Industrial Manufacturing Management Data work item
Following the creation of a WG 8, SC 4 recommends that the following three projects be part of the new work item on Industrial Manufacturing Management Data: * To develop an international standard ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
85Plenary
Establish WG 8 for Industrial Manufacturing Management Data
Following the assignment of the accepted new work item on Industrial Manufacturing Management Data (N60), ISO/TC 184/SC 4 establishes a new working group (WG 8) with the following title and scope: ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
84Plenary
Approve SC 4 formal procedures for STEP development and documentation
SC 4 approves the principle of setting up formal procedures within its organisation. SC 4 welcomes its Chairman's proposals for the following procedures: 1. SC 4 procedures for the approval of STEP...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
83Plenary
Invite P-members to nominate representatives to WG 5 for ISO 10303 methods
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to invite P Members to nominate representatives to WG 5 to participate in the continued development of ISO 10303 methods.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
82Plenary
Request PMAG to complete procedures for integration and testing
SC 4 requests PMAG to ensure the completion of an integrated set of methods and procedures for integration, qualification, data interpretation and development of abstract test suites, together with...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
80Plenary
Request P-members to designate representatives for STEP integration and testing
In order to facilitate the STEP development process, SC 4 asks each P Member that is involved in the development of STEP application protocols and/or resource models to designate at least one repre...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
79Plenary
Instruct PMAG to plan integration and testing resources for projects
SC 4 instructs PMAG to plan the application of adequate resources for integration, qualification, data interpretation and development of conformance testing material through the lifecycle of each p...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
78Plenary
Direct all working groups to use STEP methodology and tools
SC 4 directs all SC 4 working groups to use the methodology and tools developed for STEP, unless proven not suitable.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
77Plenary
Thank conveners, project leaders, and technical experts for STEP version one
SC 4 wishes to thank the conveners, project leaders and the many technical experts who have given extraordinarily of themselves during the past years in our common effort to develop STEP version one.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
